sections.model_description: SentimentBERT-v1 is a fine-tuned BERT-base model for binary sentiment analysis (positive/negative) on English product reviews. It uses a standard [CLS] token classification head with a single dense layer.
sections.intended_use: This model is intended for analyzing customer product reviews on e-commerce platforms to determine overall sentiment polarity.
sections.out_of_scope_use: Not suitable for multi-class emotion detection, sarcasm detection, or non-English text.
sections.training_data: Fine-tuned on the Amazon Product Reviews dataset (5M reviews, English only). The dataset was filtered to remove reviews shorter than 10 words.
sections.evaluation_metrics: Accuracy: 92.3%, F1: 0.91, Precision: 0.90, Recall: 0.92. Evaluated on a held-out 20% test split.
sections.citation: Devlin et al., 2019 — BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers.
